title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kotak Mahindra Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank!
